title: Piptospatha marginata
taxonomy: Piptospatha marginata is a species of flowering plant in the family Arum. It is a tropical plant native to the island of New Guinea. The plant belongs to the genus Piptospatha, which is part of the broader Arum family (Araceae). Piptospatha marginata is a climbing plant with heart-shaped leaves and produces white flowers. As a member of the Araceae family, it is often found in tropical forests and mountainous regions.
